narrative:
Carthage Township (precinct in Athens County) has 981 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.0%, a modest Republican lean of 5.4 percentage points.
